_comment: Recommended Magisk modules for Nothing devices. Edit freely — add, remove, or reorder entries.

_fields.name: display name
_fields.source: github = auto-download from GitHub releases | ksu_store = manual (link in notes)
_fields.install_type: zip = Magisk module | apk = sideload APK
_fields.asset_pattern: regex matched against release asset filenames
_fields.requires_zygisk: true if Zygisk must be enabled in Magisk settings
_fields.use_prerelease: true for repos that publish only pre-releases (e.g. PlayIntegrityFix)
_fields.notes: extra info shown after install (setup steps, warnings, etc.)

modules.name: LSPosed
modules.description: Xposed framework for Android 8.1+ — per-app system hooks, foundation for DisableFlagSecure and many other modules.
modules.notes: Enable Zygisk in Magisk settings first

modules.name: ZygiskNext
modules.description: Standalone Zygisk for KernelSU and APatch — enables all Zygisk-dependent modules without Magisk.
modules.notes: Only needed on KernelSU/APatch — Magisk has Zygisk built-in

modules.name: ZygiskSU
modules.description: su binaries via Zygisk for KernelSU — provides Magisk-style root access for apps on KernelSU.
modules.notes: Install via KernelSU Manager → Modules → Explore → search 'zygisksu'

modules.name: Shamiko
modules.description: Hides root, Zygisk, and module list from apps — works with Magisk DenyList. Essential for banking apps and Google Wallet.

modules.name: Play Integrity Fix
modules.description: Spoof device to pass Play Integrity API checks — required for Google Wallet, banking apps, and Widevine L1 streaming.
modules.notes: Pair with Shamiko for full root concealment

modules.name: DisableFlagSecure
modules.description: Removes FLAG_SECURE from all apps — enables screenshots and screen recording in banking, streaming, and DRM-protected apps.
modules.notes: LSPosed module — requires LSPosed installed and activated for the target app

modules.name: ReVanced Extended (YouTube)
modules.description: Patched YouTube with ad blocking, SponsorBlock, Return YouTube Dislike, and 50+ additional tweaks.
modules.notes: Uninstall stock YouTube first: adb uninstall com.google.android.youtube
